title: Lucky Nick Cain
writer: George Callahan, William Rose, James Hadley Chase
actors: George Raft, Coleen Gray, Enzo Staiola
plot: American gambler Nick Cain arrives at the Mediterranean town of San Paola, and befriends an orphan Italian shoe-shine boy named Toni. He is puzzled by the reception and welcome he receives from the management of the casino until h...
